---
title: "Visual Grammar"
---

# Visual Grammar

These diagrams are review instruments. They exist to help a practitioner see missing limbs, gates, loops, recovery paths, and trust boundaries.

## Warded Spell Map

![Warded spell trust boundary](../assets/diagrams/generated/ward-jailbreak-resilience-review.svg)

## Clause Review Diagrams

| Spell                                                                             | Diagram                                                                                                     |
| --------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [Spell of Safe Refactoring](../spells/safe-refactoring.qmd)                       | ![Spell of Safe Refactoring](../assets/diagrams/generated/spell-safe-refactoring.svg)                       |
| [Spell of Bug Diagnosis from Logs](../spells/bug-diagnosis-from-logs.qmd)         | ![Spell of Bug Diagnosis from Logs](../assets/diagrams/generated/spell-bug-diagnosis-from-logs.svg)         |
| [Spell of API Design](../spells/api-design.qmd)                                   | ![Spell of API Design](../assets/diagrams/generated/spell-api-design.svg)                                   |
| [Spell of Migration Without Data Loss](../spells/migration-without-data-loss.qmd) | ![Spell of Migration Without Data Loss](../assets/diagrams/generated/spell-migration-without-data-loss.svg) |
| [Spell of Test Generation](../spells/test-generation.qmd)                         | ![Spell of Test Generation](../assets/diagrams/generated/spell-test-generation.svg)                         |
| [Spell of Performance Tuning](../spells/performance-tuning.qmd)                   | ![Spell of Performance Tuning](../assets/diagrams/generated/spell-performance-tuning.svg)                   |
| [Spell of Jailbreak-Resilience Review](../spells/jailbreak-resilience-review.qmd) | ![Spell of Jailbreak-Resilience Review](../assets/diagrams/generated/spell-jailbreak-resilience-review.svg) |

## Stack Graphs

| Stack                                                                            | Diagram                                                                                                    |
| -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [Code Generation and Repair Loop](../stacks/code-generation-and-repair-loop.qmd) | ![Code Generation and Repair Loop](../assets/diagrams/generated/stack-code-generation-and-repair-loop.svg) |
| [Bug-Hunt Stack](../stacks/bug-hunt-stack.qmd)                                   | ![Bug-Hunt Stack](../assets/diagrams/generated/stack-bug-hunt-stack.svg)                                   |
| [Safe Refactor Stack](../stacks/safe-refactor-stack.qmd)                         | ![Safe Refactor Stack](../assets/diagrams/generated/stack-safe-refactor-stack.svg)                         |
| [Live Migration Stack](../stacks/live-migration-stack.qmd)                       | ![Live Migration Stack](../assets/diagrams/generated/stack-live-migration-stack.svg)                       |
| [Release Gate Stack](../stacks/release-gate-stack.qmd)                           | ![Release Gate Stack](../assets/diagrams/generated/stack-release-gate-stack.svg)                           |
| [Recursive Decomposition Stack](../stacks/recursive-decomposition-stack.qmd)     | ![Recursive Decomposition Stack](../assets/diagrams/generated/stack-recursive-decomposition-stack.svg)     |
| [AI Red-Team Loop](../stacks/ai-red-team-loop.qmd)                               | ![AI Red-Team Loop](../assets/diagrams/generated/stack-ai-red-team-loop.svg)                               |
